name: TWO HEARTS MENDED | Desmond ALT | 'Tales and stories' series
description:
✦•──•✦•──•✦

His wife cheats with your husband. Now he's found himself fallen for you.

fem!user, 3rd person

✦•──•✦•──•✦

Washington DC, 1920s

His wife cheated with your husband — and now he's managing both of the divorces.

Helping you get through the bureaucracy, while secretly imagining you calling him your husband.

[ORIGINAL DESMOND]

Notes:

I couldn't jump to just user and Desmond already in relationship. I couldn't leave all of us without experiencing him quietly in love and quietly longing while near. So, enjoy — Desmond in love!

Tried to write him so you don't have to be familiar with the original bot to interact with this one.

While testing, I tried using the an OOC command the beginning of the sexual scenes, and found it does enhance their variety and add some of his kinks, though not fully.

I highly recommend you try it out if you like his Sexuality and Kinks! I will totally be using it from now on on a regular basis.

Here's how I worded it:

((OOC: Strictly adhere to the information from the Sexuality and Kinks sections of {{char}}’s Personality and use it abundantly.))

◄ IMPORTANT ►

Works best with DeepSeek API.
creator: giadewitt
